title: leymus ugamicus
side_effects: Leymus ugamicus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues like diarrhea and nausea, as well as allergic reactions like hives and itching. In severe cases, improper use can lead to more serious conditions, including kidney damage and respiratory problems. The plant's toxic compounds can also interact with certain medications, exacerbating their side effects and potentially causing liver damage. Improperly used Leymus ugamicus can also cause cardiovascular issues, including increased heart rate and blood pressure.
